mapper.select:
select ct.cert_type_seq, ct.cert_type_name, ct.hidden_yn, ct.created_at, ct.cert_type_code, ct.manage_auth_group, ct.print_days, ct.max_print_count, ct.updated_at, ct.cert_description,
req.cert_request_seq, req.request_reason, req.status, req.requested_at, req.approved_at, req.rejected_at, req.reject_reason, req.print_available_at, req.print_expires_at, req.applied_print_days, req.applied_max_print, req.printed_count
from cert_type ct
left join ( select * from ( select cir.*, row_number() over ( partition by cir.cert_type_seq order by cir.requested_at desc, cir.cert_request_seq desc ) as rn from cert_issue_request cir where cir.users_id = #{loginId} ) where rn = 1 ) req on ct.cert_type_seq = req.cert_type_seq
where ct.hidden_yn = 'N' order by ct.cert_type_seq
